description.value:
A short, slightly curved naval blade built for close-quarters fighting. Equally at home on a ship deck or a city street, the cutlass rewards fighters who press relentlessly forward.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d4, Slashing
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Deflect, Punch
MasterOne-Handed, Finesse, Melee d6, Deflect, Punch â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you score a critical hit or reduce a target to 0 HP, you may make an extra attack against a different creature within 5 ft. This can repeat if that attack also crits or reduces to 0 HP.

rmeData.masterPerk: When you score a critical hit or reduce a target to 0 HP, you may make an extra attack against a different creature within 5 ft. This can repeat if that attack also crits or reduces to 0 HP.
